2026-04-08T19:20:43.7148555Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.

2026-04-08T19:20:43.7153600Z 
2026-04-08T19:20:43.7153865Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T19:20:43.7154985Z
